title: Code Review Agent
summary: Review a pull request for bugs, regressions, missing tests, and risky assumptions.

title: Test Writer Agent
summary: Add focused tests that match the existing codebase style.

title: Bug Hunt Agent
summary: Reproduce, isolate, fix, and verify a bug.

title: Dependency Upgrade Agent
summary: Upgrade dependencies with risk notes and verification.

title: Docs Refresh Agent
summary: Update stale docs so they match current behavior.

title: Release Notes Agent
summary: Turn commits and pull requests into useful release notes.

title: SQL Analyst Agent
summary: Produce trustworthy SQL analysis with assumptions and caveats.

title: Support Triage Agent
summary: Classify support messages and propose next actions.

title: Meeting to Actions Agent
summary: Convert notes or transcripts into decisions, owners, and tasks.

title: PRD to Tickets Agent
summary: Break a product brief into buildable engineering tickets.

title: Incident Postmortem Agent
summary: Write a blameless incident postmortem with follow-up actions.

title: Marketing Page Critic Agent
summary: Audit a landing page for clarity, trust, conversion, and messaging.
